zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Lennard於1527年8月16日出生在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素時，她的父親Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent19歲，母親Elizabeth Harmon17歲。她於1540年與Sir George John Calvert在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年3月在英國越可爾哈利法可享年88歲，埋葬在英國越可爾哈利法可聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Lennard于1527年8月16日出生在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素时，她的父亲Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent19岁，母亲Elizabeth Harmon17岁。她于1540年与Sir George John Calvert在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1616年3月在英国越可爾哈利法可享年88岁，埋葬在英国越可爾哈利法可聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Lennard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Lennert   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Leonard
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Lennard was born on 16 August 1527, in Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England, her father, Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent, was 19 and her mother, Elizabeth Harmon, was 17. She married Sir George John Calvert in 1540, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 7 daughters. She died in March 1616, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Lennard est née le 16 août 1527, à Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Harmon, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George John Calvert en 1540, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1616, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Lennard am 16. August 1527 in Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent 19 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Harmon 17. Sie hat 1540 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England Sir George John Calvert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1616 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Halifax, Yorkshire, England und wurde in St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Lennard è nata il il 16 agosto 1527 nel Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Harmon, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir George John Calvert nel 1540, nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1616, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Lennardが1527年8月16日にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス カストルで生まれた時，父Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kentは19歳，母Elizabeth Harmonは17歳であった。1540年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスでSir George John Calvertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年3月にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで88歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックススト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Halifax St John the Baptist, Halifax, Yo: 영국 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, En: 영국 켄트 처베닝 스트 벗프'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Lennard(이)가 1527년 8월 16일 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Harmon(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 Sir George John Calvert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 3월 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Lennard nasceu em 16 de agosto de 1527, em Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Harmon, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George John Calvert em 1540, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1616, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Lennard родилась 16 августа 1527 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс кастл, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harmon, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George John Calvert в 1540 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла марта 1616 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Lennard nació el 16 de agosto de 1527, en Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Page Leonard, III, High Barrister at Lincoln Inn, Sheriff of Kent, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Harmon, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir George John Calvert en 1540, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1616, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
